article_id: Article 140. Composition and election of District Assemblies
text_snippet: 1. The number of members of each District Assembly is fixed by the law. 2. The members of the District Assemblies are elected by universal, direct and secret ballot of the resident citizens.
The members of the District Assemblies are elected for three years and may have their mandate revoked by popular initiative, in the terms of the law.

article_id: Article 158. Legislation in force on the date of National Independence
text_snippet: Legislation in force on the date of National Independence remains transitorily in effect in all that may not be contrary to the present Constitution and to the remaining laws of the Republic.

1. Human life is inviolable. 2. In no case, shall capital punishment exist.

article_id: Article 24. Right to Identity and Privacy
text_snippet: Personal identity and the confidentiality of the intimacy of private and family life are inviolable.

text_snippet: The participation and direct and active involvement of citizens in the political life constitutes a fundamental condition of consolidation of the Republic.
